name: 0.2 MG Voglibose Tablets IP
about: 0.2 MG Voglibose Tablets IP are solid tablets used as a general medicine to treat type 2 diabetes mellitus. These tablets contain 0.2 mg of Voglibose as an active ingredient that helps to control blood sugar levels by inhibiting alpha-glucosidase enzymes. These tablets are manufactured in India and come in a physical form of tablets. It is recommended to store them in a dry place to ensure their effectiveness and quality. These tablets are commonly prescribed by doctors for people suffering from type 2 diabetes to control their blood glucose levels.

faq.q: What is the recommended dosage of 0.2 MG Voglibose Tablets IP?
faq.a: The recommended dosage of 0.2 MG Voglibose Tablets IP is one tablet three times a day.

faq.q: Can these tablets be taken with other diabetes medications?
faq.a: Yes, 0.2 MG Voglibose Tablets IP can be taken with other diabetes medications, but it is always recommended to consult a doctor before taking any medication.

faq.q: Are there any side effects of taking 0.2 MG Voglibose Tablets IP?
faq.a: Yes, some common side effects of taking 0.2 MG Voglibose Tablets IP are stomach pain, diarrhea, flatulence, and bloating. If these side effects persist, consult a doctor immediately.

faq.q: Can these tablets be taken by pregnant women?
faq.a: It is not recommended to take 0.2 MG Voglibose Tablets IP during pregnancy as there is limited information available on its safety during pregnancy.

faq.q: Is a prescription required to purchase 0.2 MG Voglibose Tablets IP?
faq.a: Yes, a prescription is required to purchase 0.2 MG Voglibose Tablets IP as it is a prescription medication used to treat type 2 diabetes.
